text.title: Solo Lead Qualification — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `QualifiedLead` record. The agent must satisfy this contract before returning to the operator.

list.item: `lead_id` — string, stable identifier (thread URL / message-ID hash)
`scores.contractor_trauma_history` — integer 1-5 with `evidence_quote` (may be the absence quote)
`reason` — string ≤ 200 chars referencing the decisive dimension

antipattern.description: Score field populated without an `evidence_quote` (or with the string "implied" / "inferred" / "common sense" instead of a verbatim quote).
antipattern.reason: Violates r2. The whole rubric depends on falsifiable grounding; ungrounded scores are worse than no score.

antipattern.description: Output containing a `decision: book` with `floor_check.below_floor: true`.
antipattern.reason: Violates r4. If the implied rate is below floor, Budget-clarity is coerced to 1; total can mechanically exceed 14 only if the other three are 5-5-3+, which is fine — but then the operator is BOOKED INTO a known-loss engagement. The contract REJECTS this combination at validation time.
Violates r5 veto. The trauma veto is a hard rule that the synthesis layer must not "average away" because the other three scores are high.

antipattern.description: `evidence_quote` that paraphrases the prospect's words ("they basically said budget was around 10k").
antipattern.reason: Paraphrased quotes are LLM confabulation. Quote must be verbatim or NULL.

antipattern.description: `reason` field that names a personal characteristic of the prospect ("they seemed cheap", "founder seemed flaky").
antipattern.reason: Rubric scores SIGNALS, not character. Personal judgments are out of scope and operator-facing only.

list.item: Trim `evidence_quote` to ≤ 200 chars, preserving numbers, dates, and named tools.
Re-base `lead_id` to a deterministic hash if no thread URL is available.
Round implied hourly rate to nearest $5 for `floor_check`.

text.reference: JSON Schema the output must validate against.

list.item: All four score fields present with integer 1-5 and verbatim `evidence_quote`.
Total = sum of four scores (no arithmetic error).
`decision` consistent with thresholds r3 AND r5 veto AND r4 floor-coupling.
